title: [FIRRTL][InferWidths] Skip over property types
body: No property types have inferrable widths, so we need to teach InferWidths to gracefully ignore them. InferWidths assumes that every type is convertible to a base type by `getBaseType(FIRRTLType)`.  This function will now return null when the type is not convertible to a base type, which includes property types. Inferwidths now checks to see if the conversion to a base type was successful.
